imageinfo.canonicaltitle: File:The art of painting, and the lives of the painters containing, a compleat treatise of painting, designing (IA gri 33125010838924).pdf

ObjectName.value: The art of painting, and the lives of the painters : containing, a compleat treatise of painting, designing, and the use of prints : with reflections on the works of the most celebrated painters, and of the several schools of Europe, as well ancient as modern : being the newest, and most perfect work of the kind extant

Categories.value: Scans from the Internet Archive/unverified|PD US expired|Scans from the Internet Archive|Files with bad file names|Books published in London|Books uploaded by Fæ|IA books of at least 500 pages|Images from the Getty Research Institute

Artist.value:
Piles, Roger de, 1635-1709
Buckeridge, Bainbrigg, 1668-1733
Coypel, Antoine, 1661-1722
Nutting, Joseph
Nutt, John
Savage, John, translator

ImageDescription.value:
Translated by John Savage. "An essay towards an English-School" chiefly by Bainbrigg Buckeridge. See British Library Integrated Catalogue, online catalog
Engraved frontispiece by Joseph Nutting after Antoine Coypel
Signatures: A-2H⁸ 2I⁴. Horizontal chainlines
Includes index
Nutt's notices on last p
Binding, c. 1: calfskin, blind-tooled panels sprinkled black and plain; signatures of J. Parkinson of Bevendale, and J. Wright; occasional marginal notes in English
Binding, c. 2: calfskin, blind-tooled panels sprinkled black and plain. Spine gilt tooled, author & title on label. Edges of boards gilt rolled. Page edges sprinkled red. Ulrich Middeldorf's printed label. Printed slips from booksellers' catalogs describing the present work are inserted

Subjects: Painting; Painters; Painters
